programmes.show_description: Thick-Skinned. Brittany has been called a monster due to a genetic condition that causes head-to-toe bumps. Tamyra has skin so thick she shaves the bottom of her feet for relief. S3, Ep11
My Third Eye. Jaclyn has a lump on the back of her head that causes her emotional distress. Shane has a growth between his eyes that could put him in danger at his electrician job. S3, Ep12
Renee's Story. Former plus-size model and 'big is beautiful' advocate, Renee realises her mortal mistakes as her weight swells to 600 lbs and her health crumbles. S6, Ep10

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Stand Your Ground. Danielle wants a sparkly gown, but she must convince her critical Nan! Tomboy Devina seeks a sexy silhouette to show off her assets - and match her trainers. S2, Ep26

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Stuck On Style. Jennifer craves a high-neck Victorian style, but her wedding is three weeks away. Can David help? Giovanna wants a modern look, but her mum is fiercely traditional! S2, Ep27

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Over The Top Show. Bride Alex wants drama - and colour - and has an unlimited budget! Will she go for a red number for her wedding in South Africa? David helps her decide. S2, Ep28

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Family Knows Best Show. Emotions run high as Daniella conflicts with her mum over her dress. Princess gown or fishtail? Ayshe wants a slim-fit gown, but her mum is unconvinced. S2, Ep29
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
The Dress. Molly puts her dieting in overdrive and has a meltdown when her wedding dress doesn't fit three weeks before the wedding. S2, Ep20
Bachelor/Bachelorette. When Mike's dad comes to town early for his son's bachelor party, Peggy decides she should attend Molly's bachelorette bash. S2, Ep21
The Rehearsal. With only two days to go before the big day, Mike and Molly stage their wedding rehearsal - with disastrous results when it's upended by their family. S2, Ep22
A House For Sale. When Sheldon learns the house next door is for sale, he looks for the perfect neighbours. Missy pitches against her boyfriend at the baseball game. S3, Ep19
A Baby Tooth. Sheldon has a scientific breakthrough at the dentist. Dale and Meemaw go to the casino. Georgie makes a mistake when he's left in charge of the store. S3, Ep20
A Secret Letter. Sheldon discovers that Mary's been keeping a secret about his future. Also, Meemaw is furious when she learns that Dale fired Georgie. S3, Ep21
The Colonization Application. There's trouble in paradise when Amy learns Sheldon signed up for a one-way mission to colonise Mars. Leonard makes an 'adult' purchase for Penny. S8, Ep17
The Leftover Thermalization. An electrical short thaws the last meal cooked by Mrs. Wolowitz, and Sheldon and Leonard's work is featured in a magazine, but only one gets credit. S8, Ep18
The Skywalker Incursion. Leonard and Sheldon consider dropping by George Lucas' Skywalker Ranch when a speaking engagement puts them nearby. S8, Ep19
Fortification Implementation. Sheldon and Amy reach a crossroad, a man claiming to be Wolowitz's half-brother shows up, and Penny and Leonard argue live on Wil Wheaton's podcast. S8, Ep20
Communication Deterioration. NASA asks Raj to craft a message for aliens in the event of contact, and Penny must choose between an audition or her job in pharmaceutical sales. S8, Ep21
The Graduation Transmission. Wolowitz and Sheldon can't get a drone to fly, Leonard nearly misses giving a commencement address, and Raj pits his parents against each other. S8, Ep22
The Maternal Combustion. Leonard and Sheldon's mothers come to town to celebrate their sons getting an award, but the opinionated women engage in an altercation over religion. S8, Ep23
The Commitment Determination. Leonard and Penny are pressured to set a wedding date by Sheldon, whose relationship with Amy has taken an interesting turn. S8, Ep24
The Wedding. Chaos ensues on Mike and Molly's long awaited wedding day as anything that can go wrong, does go wrong. S2, Ep23
The Honeymoon Is Over. Mike is inspired by their honeymoon to change his life and travel the world, while Molly worries how their friends and family managed without them. S3, Ep1
Vince Takes A Bath. When Vince throws out his back, Joyce disappears, leaving Mike and Molly to care for him. Meanwhile, the newlyweds struggle to write thank-you notes. S3, Ep2
Graduation. After graduating high school, Sheldon has a breakdown when he realises he may not be ready for college. Also, Dale tries to make amends with Meemaw. S4, Ep1
A Docent, A Little Lady. While Sheldon volunteers at a local train museum, Missy embarks on a new stage of womanhood, and Georgie discovers his mother's guilty pleasure. S4, Ep2
Training Wheels. Sheldon is determined to ride his bike without training wheels and has Missy teach him. Mary and George argue over parenting styles. S4, Ep3
The Matrimonial Momentum. Penny has a problem dealing with Leonard's confession about having kissed another woman, while Sheldon is confused about Amy calling a time out. S9, Ep1
The Separation Oscillation. To ease Penny's mind, Leonard pays a visit to the woman he kissed during his expedition to the North Sea. Sheldon's breakup leads him to retaliate. S9, Ep2
The Bachelor Party Corrosion. The guys surprise Leonard with a belated bachelor-party weekend in Mexico, but their plans hit a bump in the road when they get a flat tire. S9, Ep3
The 2003 Approximation. Sheldon reverts to 2003 when he learns that Leonard and Penny are moving in together, while Howard and Raj form a band to play at the comic store. S9, Ep4
The Perspiration Implementation. When Barry Kripke gives the guys fencing lessons, he makes a point of letting Sheldon know he's interested in dating Amy. S9, Ep5
The Helium Insufficiency. A helium shortage leads Sheldon and Leonard to do business with a dealer in the black market to acquire some of the element for an experiment. S9, Ep6
The Spock Resonance. Sheldon's interview for a 'Star Trek' documentary focusing on Spock turns up a shocking revelation about his breakup with Amy. S9, Ep7
The Mystery Date Observation. When Leonard, Penny and Bernadette learn that Amy is going out on a dinner date, the trio set out to spy on her and the guy. S9, Ep8

programmes.show_name: New: Dr Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programmes.show_description: Holey Moley. Bill's arm growth ruins retirement plans. Regina hides facial moles with bold style and Dr. Lee and med student Gili investigate Cowboy Carter's rash. S1, Ep7

programmes.show_name: New: Dr Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programmes.show_description: Tag Team My Bumps. Dr. Lee and Zoe treat Mary Ann's crusty skin. Isaiah ignores a lump on his spine and Maressa fears treating the oozing skin covering her ankles. S1, Ep8
Best friends and comedians Roisin Conaty and Sara Pascoe are visiting locations with the most hilarious, baffling and terribly bad reviews.
The Never-Ending Keloids. Jeremy is a pastor with a hanging growth in an embarrassing location. Todd has a bump protruding from his forehead that is painful and humiliating. S4, Ep4
Shoulder Boulder. Stacey's shoulder growth prevents her from being the playful teacher she once was. Matthew worries that his mysterious shin rash may be dangerous. S3, Ep13
Brain Pimple. Robert has a tomato-sized growth on his butt cheek that causes him pain and discomfort. Sharon has a stinky, squirting cyst under her breast. S3, Ep14
Jennifer And Marissa's Story. Jennifer and daughter Marissa have a co-dependent relationship, putting both of their lives in jeopardy, with a combined weight of over 900-lbs. S6, Ep11

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The High Expectations Show. Picky wedding planner Becky seeks the ultimate dress - will a shimmering fishtail impress? And perfectionist Denise aims to find her dream gown. S2, Ep30

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Self Esteem Show. Bride Hetty's alopecia affected her confidence and she wants a simple, elegant dress to flatter her figure. And Hannah seeks a tight-fitting fishtail frock. S2, Ep31

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress Lancashire
programmes.show_description: A Break With Tradition. 1950s-mad bride Danielle wants a vintage-style dress, but will it be within her budget? Two brides help each other find their dream dresses. S1, Ep4

Mike Likes Cake. Molly is mortified when she reviews her wedding photos and sees that Mike either has his mouth open or his eyes closed in every single shot. S3, Ep3
Molly In The Middle. Mike and Molly decide they're ready to start trying for a baby. And Carl gets upset when he learns that Molly is still spending time with Christina. S3, Ep4
Mike's Boss. Mike is put in an uncomfortable situation when his mom starts dating his boss, despite his many reservations. S3, Ep5
Bible Camp And A Chariot Of Love. Sheldon ends up in a fierce competition with Paige after their mums force them to attend Vacation Bible School. Georgie makes a questionable purchase. S4, Ep4
A Musty Crypt. While Mary and George take a trip, Georgie freaks out when his girlfriend thinks she's pregnant. Dale and Meemaw work out their relationship issues. S4, Ep5
Freshman Orientation. While college orientation does not go as Sheldon planned, Mary is mistaken for a university student and invited to a party. S4, Ep6
The Platonic Permutation. Sheldon and Amy spend Thanksgiving at the aquarium, Wolowitz volunteers at a soup kitchen, and Penny realises that Leonard knows a lot about her. S9, Ep9
The Earworm Reverberation. God only knows what song is constantly playing in Sheldon's head, but it reminds him of Amy and leads to a surprising revelation. S9, Ep10

The Positive Negative Reaction. The gang learns Bernadette is pregnant and celebrates with karaoke. Meanwhile, Howard freaks out, convinced he must make more money for the baby. S9, Ep16
The Art Of Breadcrumbing. Vanja demands answers about Tony's past, Cortney struggles to walk away from Colt, and Sophie and Pedro finally share a romantic moment. S5, Ep6
Kissing Another Man's Wife. The Browns celebrate the holidays with new traditions, and Kody and Robyn decorate their Christmas tree with Aurora's new boyfriend. S13, Ep5
